form.formComment: Third-up today and placed third-up previously. Freshened for 39 days. First-up 5th of 9 at Wolverhampton on February 3 over 1020m, 2.5 len behind Love Alive carrying 59kg at $17. Second run from a spell second last of 7 at Southwell All Weather on February 28 over 1000m, 6 len behind Alfa Duplicate with 58.5kg at $12. Better than the last start suggests.

form.formComment: Resumes from a spell. Finished off last preparation second last of 7 at Southwell All Weather November 3 over 1400m, 11 len behind Boy Named Sioux with 61kg at $12. form.formComment: Second-up. First-up after four months 5th of 7 at Newcastle All Weather on March 21 over 1200m, 4 len behind Southern Warrior carrying 59.5kg at $3.80. Previously second-up second last in a small field at Ripon on September 27 over 1200m, 7 len behind Here Forever carrying 57.5kg at $6.50. Rates highly and is among the leading hopes.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: 2 furlongs out, moved off its intended line.

form.formComment: Resuming after a six-and-a-half months break. Finished off last campaign ninth of 14 at Redcar September 24 over 1220m, 9 len behind Soul Warrior carrying 60kg at $41. On debut second last of 8 at Thirsk May 3 over 1000m, 7 len behind Under The Radar with 59.5kg at $7. Prefer to see how he has returned.

form.formComment: Form hard to fault. Last start favourite; won by a neck at Newcastle All Weather March 12 over 1000m defeating Mister Moet carrying 59kg at $3. The run before that 4th of 7 at Southwell All Weather on February 28 over 1000m, 2 len behind Alfa Duplicate carrying 55.5kg at $2.50. Will be rock hard fit and appeals as one of the leading chances.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Denied a clear run approaching the final furlong.

form.formComment: Filly back from a spell of six months. Has placed previously first up from a break. Finished off last campaign fourth of 8 at Redcar October 17 over 1000m, 3 len behind Bella Delizia with 61kg at $2.60. When resuming last campaign third of 8 at Redcar September 16 over 1000m, 5 len behind Schrodinger's Cat carrying 57kg at $9. Expected to play a major role.
